title: UpSet Chart で 4 集合の交差パターンを比較する
novelty_reason: ベン図では集合数が増えるほど読み取りが難しくなる交差関係を、UpSet Chart の行列と棒グラフで定量比較できる形にします。
why_it_works: 上段で交差サイズ、下段で参加集合、左側で集合サイズを分離して表示するため、どの組み合わせが主要かを短時間で把握できます。
how_to_read: 上段の棒が高いほど、その交差パターンの件数が多いです。
下段の濃い点と縦線で、どの集合がその交差に参加しているかを読みます。
transform_js: const setsRaw = Array.isArray(rawData.sets) ? rawData.sets : []; const sets = setsRaw.map((name, idx) => String(name ?? ('S' + String(idx + 1)))); const intersectionsRaw = Array.isArray(rawData.intersections) ? rawData.intersections : []; const normalized = intersectionsRaw.map((item) => { const includedRaw = Array.isArray(item && item.sets) ? item.sets : []; const included = includedRaw.map((value) => String(value)); const uniqueIncluded = included.filter((value, idx) => sets.includes(value) && included.indexOf(value) === idx); const label = uniqueIncluded.length > 0 ? uniqueIncluded.join(' ∩ ') : '∅'; const count = Math.max(0, Number(item && item.count != null ? item.count : 0)); return { sets: uniqueIncluded, label: label, count: count }; }).filter((row) => row.sets.length > 0 && Number.isFinite(row.count)); normalized.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count); const intersections = normalized.slice(0, Math.min(normalized.length, 12)); const comboLabels = intersections.map((row, idx) => row.label + ' #' + String(idx + 1)); const counts = intersections.map((row) => row.count); const allCells = []; const activeCells = []; const linePointsList = []; const setTotalsMap = {}; sets.forEach((setName) => { setTotalsMap[setName] = 0; }); intersections.forEach((row, colIndex) => { const points = []; sets.forEach((setName) => { allCells.push([comboLabels[colIndex], setName, 0]); const on = row.sets.includes(setName); if (on) { activeCells.push([comboLabels[colIndex], setName, row.count]); points.push([comboLabels[colIndex], setName]); setTotalsMap[setName] = (setTotalsMap[setName] || 0) + row.count; } }); linePointsList.push(points); }); const setTotals = sets.map((setName) => ({ set: setName, total: Number(setTotalsMap[setName] || 0) })); transformedData = { sets: sets, comboLabels: comboLabels, counts: counts, allCells: allCells, activeCells: activeCells, linePointsList: linePointsList, setTotals: setTotals };
echarts_js: const sets = Array.isArray(transformedData.sets) ? transformedData.sets : []; const comboLabels = Array.isArray(transformedData.comboLabels) ? transformedData.comboLabels : []; const counts = Array.isArray(transformedData.counts) ? transformedData.counts : []; const allCells = Array.isArray(transformedData.allCells) ? transformedData.allCells : []; const activeCells = Array.isArray(transformedData.activeCells) ? transformedData.activeCells : []; const linePointsList = Array.isArray(transformedData.linePointsList) ? transformedData.linePointsList : []; const setTotals = Array.isArray(transformedData.setTotals) ? transformedData.setTotals : []; const lineSeries = []; for (let i = 0; i < linePointsList.length; i += 1) { const points = Array.isArray(linePointsList[i]) ? linePointsList[i] : []; if (points.length < 2) { continue; } lineSeries.push({ type: 'line', xAxisIndex: 1, yAxisIndex: 1, data: points, showSymbol: false, silent: true, lineStyle: { color: '#4f46e5', width: 1.6, opacity: 0.75 }, z: 12, emphasis: { disabled: true }, tooltip: { show: false } }); } option = { animation: false, grid: [{ left: '40%', right: '6%', top: 30, height: '30%' }, { left: '40%', right: '6%', top: '50%', bottom: 56 }, { left: '8%', width: '24%', top: '50%', bottom: 56 }], xAxis: [{ gridIndex: 0, type: 'category', data: comboLabels, axisTick: { show: false }, axisLine: { show: false }, axisLabel: { show: false } }, { gridIndex: 1, type: 'category', data: comboLabels, axisLabel: { color: '#475569', rotate: 35, fontSize: 10 }, axisTick: { alignWithLabel: true }, axisLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#94a3b8' } } }, { gridIndex: 2, type: 'value', axisLabel: { color: '#475569' }, splitLine: { show: false }, axisLine: { show: true } }], yAxis: [{ gridIndex: 0, type: 'value', name: 'intersection size', nameTextStyle: { color: '#475569' }, axisLabel: { color: '#475569' }, splitLine: { lineStyle: { color: '#e2e8f0' } } }, { gridIndex: 1, type: 'category', data: sets, inverse: true, axisLabel: { color: '#334155', fontWeight: 600 }, axisLine: { show: false }, axisTick: { show: false }, splitLine: { show: false } }, { gridIndex: 2, type: 'category', data: sets, inverse: true, axisLabel: { show: false }, axisLine: { show: false }, axisTick: { show: false }, splitLine: { show: false } }], tooltip: { trigger: 'item' }, series: [{ name: 'intersection', type: 'bar', xAxisIndex: 0, yAxisIndex: 0, data: counts, barMaxWidth: 28, itemStyle: { color: '#1d4ed8' }, label: { show: true, position: 'top', color: '#334155', fontSize: 10 } }, { name: 'matrix-bg', type: 'scatter', xAxisIndex: 1, yAxisIndex: 1, data: allCells, symbolSize: 8, itemStyle: { color: '#cbd5e1' }, silent: true, tooltip: { show: false }, z: 5 }, ...lineSeries, { name: 'matrix-active', type: 'scatter', xAxisIndex: 1, yAxisIndex: 1, data: activeCells, symbolSize: 11, itemStyle: { color: '#1e40af' }, z: 20 }, { name: 'set-size', type: 'bar', xAxisIndex: 2, yAxisIndex: 2, data: setTotals.map((row) => row.total), barMaxWidth: 16, itemStyle: { color: '#0f766e' }, label: { show: true, position: 'right', color: '#334155', fontSize: 10 } } ] };
